value.original: It is only allowed to register in phase and task of execution type

row.value: Unicamente se permite registrar en fase y tarea de tipo ejecución

value.original: It is only allowed to register in phase and task of execution type

row.value: Unicamente se permite registrar en fase y tarea de tipo ejecución

value.original: A record with the same Salary Category already exists for this task.

row.value: Ya existe un registro con la misma Categoria Salarial para esta tarea.

value.original: A record with the same Salary Category already exists for this task.

row.value: Ya existe un registro con la misma Categoria Salarial para esta tarea.

value.original: There is already a record with the same machinery

row.value: Ya existe un registro con la misma maquinaria

value.original: A record with the same indirect cost already exists for this task.
